purpose: Mgmt API ops: project-introspection, scoped-key mint, JWT-secret rotation

minimum_scope.description: Mgmt API PATs are all-or-nothing in Supabase today — the token grants access to every project the issuing user can see. Mitigate by issuing the PAT from a dedicated service-user that's a member of ONLY the projects kit needs.
minimum_scope.recommended_org_membership: single project per kit-PAT; rotate the PAT itself quarterly
